channel.title: ClawDrop
channel.description: Playbooks, guides, and use cases for OpenClaw — the open-source AI agent framework.

item.title: Build a Polymarket Trading Bot
item.description: An AI that monitors prediction markets, analyzes events, and executes trades based on your strategy while you focus on your day job.
item.dc:creator: ClawDrop

item.title: Bot-to-Bot Commerce: AIs Negotiating with AIs
item.description: Multiple AI agents coordinating, negotiating, and transacting with each other in a shared environment. The future of automated business operations.
item.dc:creator: ClawDrop

item.title: AI Launches a Token Autonomously
item.description: The Asymmetrix team gave their AI agent full autonomy to create and launch a crypto token. It did everything: branding, smart contract, liquidity, and marketing.
item.dc:creator: ClawDrop

item.title: AI Grocery Shopping with a Virtual Credit Card
item.description: Your AI orders groceries online using a virtual card, handles substitutions, and keeps your fridge stocked without you lifting a finger.
item.dc:creator: ClawDrop

item.title: AI Negotiates Your Car Purchase, Saves $4,200
item.description: Your AI handles the back-and-forth with dealerships via email, knows market value, and closes a better deal than you would.
item.dc:creator: ClawDrop

item.title: Run Your Business on AI (While Living Your Life)
item.description: Jesse Genet runs her company on OpenClaw from a Mac Mini. Amazon orders, printing, procurement, all automated while she homeschools 4 kids.
item.dc:creator: ClawDrop

item.title: The 5-Day Automation Sprint: $22K Found in Tax Deductions
item.description: Give your AI full access to your digital life for 5 days. It found $22K in missed tax deductions, built a content pipeline, and sent daily love notes to his wife.
item.dc:creator: ClawDrop

item.title: AI Negotiates Sponsorship Deals for You
item.description: Your AI handles sponsor outreach, rate card discussions, and deal negotiation via email so you can focus on creating content.
item.dc:creator: ClawDrop

item.title: AI Wins Your Insurance Dispute
item.description: Your AI drafts the appeal, cites the right policy sections, and gets a rejected claim overturned. No lawyer needed.
item.dc:creator: ClawDrop

item.title: Replace Your SaaS Stack With One AI Agent
item.description: One founder cut $500/month in SaaS fees to zero using a single OpenClaw agent on a Mac Mini. Here's how to replicate it.
item.dc:creator: ClawDrop

item.title: Cut Your AI Agent Costs by 97% with Multi-Model Routing
item.description: One user dropped from $90/month to $6 by routing tasks to the right model. Here's the exact setup.
item.dc:creator: ClawDrop

item.title: Set Up a 4-Agent Business Team on a Mac Mini
item.description: One solopreneur runs customer support, content, research, and ops with 4 AI agents on a $600 Mac Mini. Here's the architecture.
item.dc:creator: ClawDrop

item.title: Build an Autonomous Business Bot (The Felix Method)
item.description: Give your AI agent $1,000 and a goal. Nat Eliason's bot made $14,718 in 3 weeks. Here's the exact 3-layer memory system and setup.
item.dc:creator: ClawDrop

item.title: Build an AI Job Search Agent That Applies While You Sleep
item.description: A developer doubled his salary in 3 days by letting his AI agent apply to 100+ jobs. Here's how to build the same system.
item.dc:creator: ClawDrop

item.title: Turn 1,000 WhatsApp Voice Messages Into a Searchable Knowledge Base
item.description: Your team's best ideas are buried in voice messages. This system transcribes them, cross-references with project history, and builds a searchable archive of everything your team has ever discussed.
item.dc:creator: ClawDrop

item.title: This AI Trades Stocks on a Live Account While You Sleep
item.description: An OpenClaw agent monitors markets and executes trades autonomously using heartbeats. One builder is running it on a real account right now.
item.dc:creator: ClawDrop

item.title: AI Finds Leads, Builds Demo Sites, and Cold Calls Them For You
item.description: One agency owner built a full lead gen pipeline: find prospects, research them, build custom demo sites, deploy them, create video walkthroughs, and reach out via text and phone. All automated.
item.dc:creator: ClawDrop

item.title: Your AI Makes Your Coffee, Orders Your Lunch, and Answers Your Phone
item.description: Physical world automation is here. One builder connected OpenClaw to an espresso machine, food ordering, and a phone agent that talks to callers and relays to your AI.
item.dc:creator: ClawDrop

item.title: AI Whispers What to Say During Your Cold Calls in Real Time
item.description: An AI listens to your live sales calls and gives you real-time coaching on what to say next based on how the conversation is going.
item.dc:creator: ClawDrop

item.title: Turn Any Windows PC Into a Web Automation Machine
item.description: Set up parallel browser automation on a spare PC. Your agent controls 4+ Chrome instances at once, each logged into different accounts. No code, no Selenium, no proxies.
item.dc:creator: ClawDrop

item.title: Run Your AI Assistant 24/7 for $0/Month
item.description: Set up an always-on AI agent on Oracle Cloud's free tier. 4 CPU cores, 24GB RAM, 200GB storage. No credit card charges, no trial period, no surprise bills. Ever.
item.dc:creator: ClawDrop

item.title: Replace Your CRM With a Conversation
item.description: Install one skill and your AI agent becomes your CRM. Contacts, deals, follow-ups, notes. All managed through chat. No dashboards to learn, no data entry, no $50/month subscription.
item.dc:creator: ClawDrop

item.title: Research Your Competitors' Ads and Launch Your Own Campaign on Meta
item.description: Four AI agents analyze competitor ads from the Meta Ad Library, plan a campaign based on your brand, create all the assets, and publish everything to your Meta Ads account. Full pipeline from research to live campaigns in draft.
item.dc:creator: ClawDrop

item.title: Automate Your Entire Amazon Merch Upload Pipeline
item.description: Drop a design into a folder and walk away. Your AI agent removes the background, upscales it, repositions it to Amazon's specs, generates validated keywords, and uploads the listing. From image to live product in minutes.
item.dc:creator: ClawDrop

item.title: Your AI Remembers Everything So You Don't Have To
item.description: Text your AI anything worth remembering. A book recommendation, a business idea, a meeting note. It stores everything and builds you a searchable second brain you can query from anywhere.
item.dc:creator: ClawDrop

item.title: Turn Your AI Into a Real-Time Assistant That Listens, Remembers, and Acts for $50
item.description: A $50 wearable captures every conversation, meeting, and idea in real time. Your OpenClaw agent turns it into tasks, follow-ups, searchable memory, and daily briefs without you touching your phone.
item.dc:creator: ClawDrop

item.title: How One AI Prompt Landed 6 Paying Clients in a Week
item.description: An AI agent scraped 350 local businesses, built each one a custom website, mailed physical postcards with QR codes, and closed 6 monthly clients. Total AI cost: $7.
item.dc:creator: ClawDrop

item.title: Find Your Next Product Idea in 15 Seconds by Scanning Reddit and X
item.description: Install one skill, type one sentence, and your AI scans 30 days of Reddit, X, and the web for what people are complaining about, what they wish existed, and where competitors are falling short.
item.dc:creator: ClawDrop

item.title: This AI Content Factory Writes, Researches, and Designs While You Sleep
item.description: A multi-agent system where one AI researches trending topics, another writes scripts and posts, and a third generates thumbnails. Every morning at 8am, your content pipeline delivers fresh, ready-to-publish work.
item.dc:creator: ClawDrop

item.title: Build an AI Agent That Finds Real Estate Deals Before Anyone Else
item.description: An AI agent that scans public records for distressed properties, calculates equity, and builds a clean lead pipeline. Replaces hours of manual searching with overnight automation.
item.dc:creator: ClawDrop

item.title: How Much Does OpenClaw Cost? The Real Pricing Breakdown for 2026
item.description: OpenClaw is free to install. Running it costs $5-150/month. Here's exactly where every dollar goes, with real numbers from daily users.
item.dc:creator: ClawDrop

item.title: The Best OpenClaw Skills to Install in 2026 (And What to Skip)
item.description: 13,000+ skills on ClawHub. Most are junk. Here are the ones worth installing, organized by what you actually want to do.
item.dc:creator: ClawDrop

item.title: OpenClaw Browser Automation: The Complete Guide to Browser Relay, Multi-Profile, and Web Scraping
item.description: OpenClaw can control Chrome like a human. Here's how to set up browser relay, run parallel profiles, scrape websites, and automate anything that lives in a browser.
item.dc:creator: ClawDrop

item.title: How to Install OpenClaw on Windows (With Telegram, Step by Step)
item.description: A practical walkthrough for getting OpenClaw running on Windows via WSL, hooked up to Telegram, locked down, and ready to use. Based on a live install walkthrough.
item.dc:creator: ClawDrop
